word: H2755 - חֲרֵי־יֹונִים - chărêy-yôwnîym - khar-ay'-yo-neem' - Doves' dung

sections.paragraph:
Original: חראיון חרי־יונים

Transliteration: chărêy-yônı̂ym chărâ'yôn

Phonetic: khar-ay'-yo-neem'

BDB Definition:

  1. dung, doves' dung

Origin: from the pl. of H2716 and the pl. of H3123

TWOT entry: 730a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
